name: agent_memory
description:
Cross-agent persistent memory — store and recall discoveries, decisions, context, and warnings across sessions and tools.

Enables AI agents to build institutional knowledge that persists beyond individual conversations. Supports storing, recalling by topic, filtering by tags, and retrieving recent entries.

agent_type.description: Agent identifier, e.g. claude_code, cursor, windsurf (for store)

memory_type.description: Type of memory (for store). Default: context

topic.description: Topic to recall memories about (for recall)

limit.description: Maximum memories to return (for recall/get_recent). Default: 10
